description: Emergency Response (ERP) — emergency response plan management with automated notification cascades, checklists, resource mobilization, and post-incident documentation

hard_stops.label: NTSB Notification Required
hard_stops.logic: Event meets 49 CFR 830.5 criteria for immediate NTSB notification (accident or serious incident) but notification has not been documented as sent

hard_stops.label: Wreckage Preservation Not Documented
hard_stops.logic: NTSB-reportable event but wreckage preservation instructions have not been documented per 49 CFR 830.10

soft_flags.label: ERP Drill Overdue
soft_flags.logic: Emergency response plan has not been tested via drill or tabletop exercise in the past 12 months

soft_flags.label: Contact Tree Outdated
soft_flags.logic: Emergency contact tree contains entries that have not been verified in the past 6 months

soft_flags.label: Family Notification Pending
soft_flags.logic: Emergency event involves crew or passengers but family/NOK notification has not been documented

soft_flags.label: Media Inquiry Received
soft_flags.logic: Media inquiry received regarding the event — route to designated media contact per ERP
